summary: ChipSelect control enhanced: added setOptions() for cascade population, added overridable onChange getter/setter for wiring. CSS updated with flex-wrap:wrap and gap:4px for overflow handling. HardwareTab redesigned: CPU & Memory uses ToggleGroup (Real/Random/Custom) + ChipSelect for HardwareTiers; Screen Resolution uses ToggleGroup + ChipSelect for ScreenPresets. Both chip selects wrap in grid. Cascade wiring updated in CreateProfileModal. Linter: 0 errors.
current_status: HardwareTab: CPU Tier and Resolution now use ChipSelect (chips wrap, single-select). ToggleGroup Real/Random/Custom controls visibility. Cascade populates options from template. Build 0 errors.
